This workflow creates videos using ControlNet, Depth, or OpenPose. You can use only a prompt, or include a reference image to stylize the subject.

There are four ControlNet modes:

Normal – Uses the raw input video and works well for any subject.

Depthmap – Uses the depth map from the input video and works well for animals, people, and most subjects. It preserves shape details, while prompting adds additional features.

Depthmap HQ – Produces a higher-quality depth map for more accurate detail reproduction.

OpenPose – Suitable only for humans. It controls the pose but not the shape details, which are determined by the prompt.

To select a ControlNet mode, set the corresponding number in the Switcher node:

Normal = 0
Depthmap = 1
Depthmap HQ = 2
OpenPose = 3
